manifest.author: Rootr
manifest.description: Team collaboration for your vault: share a chosen folder (or tagged notes) into a Rootr cloud workspace, so teammates and Claude or ChatGPT can read and write it. One-way sync — your vault stays local.
manifest.name: Rootr Sync

name: Rootr Sync

releases.author: gwmage
releases.description:
First release.

One-way sync: push a chosen vault folder (or tagged notes) into a Rootr team workspace, so teammates and Claude/ChatGPT can read and write them.

- Vault stays the source of truth — nothing is written back into your vault
- Only the folder/tag you configure is read; nothing else is scanned
- No telemetry, no background transfer, no polling
- Conflict-safe: a note changed in Rootr since the last push is never silently overwritten
